decisions.decision: Use Supabase Storage instead of Cloudflare R2
decisions.rationale: R2 requires credit card; Supabase free tier has no credit card requirement
Supabase Storage is S3-compatible so no SDK change needed, just env var swap
Supabase public URLs include bucket name in path, unlike R2 which did not

decisions.decision: Start fresh — no migration of existing avatars
decisions.rationale: User confirmed no existing avatar data worth migrating
